steps.description: Bring Zodiac Recommendation Token to BlackSmith at the entrance to the village.

entries.text: Jade Emperor said he would appoint 12 different kind of animal on the earth as Top Immortals to protect the world! Nowadays, the world is in turmoil because of these monsters and evil spirits! Lots of trials are waiting on the Zodiac Achievement way.

addPrompts.text1: It's a long journey for you, Zodiac!
Hi! Remember me? I need to talk to you, please click me.
addPrompts.text2: Your fantastic journey starts from now on!#1[4]

talkEntries.text: Jade Emperor said he would appoint 12 different kind of animal on the earth as Top Immortals to protect the world! Nowadays, the world is in turmoil because of these monsters and evil spirits! Lots of trials are waiting on the Zodiac Achievement way.

awardEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡You're talented for that!#1[11]You are an able man because you've got the Zodiac Brand!
It's said that you've got Zodiac Brand? #1[4]Congratulations!
¡¡It's my present for you! Take it please!#1[6] It'll be helpful someday.

steps.description: Kill dragonfly to get 10 "Dragonfly's Sting" and bring to"Candy"

entries.text: A clever and beautiful girl in the village has some trouble these days! Can you visit here at your convenience?

addPrompts.text1: What a practical and attractive girl you are~#1[6]

talkEntries.text: A clever and beautiful girl in the village has some trouble these days! Can you visit here at your convenience?

awardEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Thanks a lot! Did you come across something strange?

steps.description: Use "Experimental Mob Flask" to capture a "Dragonfly" and bring it to"Grocer"

entries.text: It's said that there comes a business man with a lot of treasure. He looks like he is waiting for someone!

addPrompts.text1: ¡¡¡¡Those Little Boars are coming! What are we gonna do?!!
It's said that there comes a stranger to these parts, supposedly a business man!
addPrompts.text2: Be careful on the road~#1[4]He is supposed to be in the village right now!

talkEntries.text: It's said that there comes a business man with a lot of treasure. He looks like he is waiting for someone!

awardEntries.text: You are the one I'm looking for!!
I believe you will be that Zodiac envoy, #1[6]I support you spiritually!!
No wander you got that brand!!

entries.text: Can you help me with something? Here is the thing...

talkEntries.text: Can you help me with something? Here is the thing...

awardEntries.text: Sorry to bother you so much!
How can we let that happen! We must figure something out!
You look so upset, what's wrong?
I leave it to you now! Get it done by any means!!

steps.description: Kill "Roaming Soul"at night in Cloud City : 159.284

entries.text: You must be tired for keeping guard for a whole night!#1[35]

awardEntries.text: You must be tired for keeping guard for a whole night!#1[35]

steps.description: Wait and speak with Bonnie at night. Quest reward: None Quest Description: Franklin seems depressed and dreamy. He may be possessed by evil spirit. Wait to find out the ghost at night. Tip: Complete "Task 71" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Bonnie's soul will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

At your 14 level, go to speak with "Franklin" Quest reward: None Quest Description: Orchid Temple is at the north of Cloud City. There are no monks living there now. The temple is said to be haunted by ghost. A young man called Franklin came back from there the other day. It seems he is possessed by evil spirits. Please pay a visit to him. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Back ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Previous

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡You can't be Bonnie! She only appears at night!

addPrompts.text1: I've gotten into a little trouble..!!
You can't be Bonnie! She only appears at night!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡You can't be Bonnie! She only appears at night!
¡¡¡¡Franklin must be petrified when he sees me right now. Could you do just one thing for me? Can you take this to him?

awardEntries.text: Who are you? Why are you here?
I will never forget you for helping me~
My Bonnie! Who can help me~
My Bonnie! How can I stay with you~#1[26]

steps.description: Locate Bonnie at Orchid Temple at night. Quest reward: None Quest Description: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple. Tip: Complete "Task 7" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Soul of Bonnie will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡Thanks to Bonnie's help at Orchid Temple, I survive the evil hand of the Evils! Bonnies says that the souls there are all under threat by Evils. It's terrible! Bonnie will be controlled by them! I'm an ordinary guy and can't defeat Evils! Please help her out!
¡¡¡¡My soul is under control of the evil spirits. You should beat the evil spirits first if you want to save me~~

addPrompts.text1: Evil ghosts are doing bad things~
Please help me get Bonnie out of there!
Evil spirits are doing evil now~

addPrompts.text2: Those evil spirits are not east to knock down! Watch out!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Thanks to Bonnie's help at Orchid Temple, I survive the evil hand of the Evils! Bonnies says that the souls there are all under threat by Evils. It's terrible! Bonnie will be controlled by them! I'm an ordinary guy and can't defeat Evils! Please help her out!
¡¡¡¡My soul is under control of the evil spirits. You should beat the evil spirits first if you want to save me~~

awardEntries.text: Are you here to help me?

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Go and save those innocent ghosts first!

awardEntries.text: There is one more thing I want you to help me with...
I'll remember what happened today in mind~
I feel eternal gratitude to you for saving my life!#1[26]

talkEntries.text: ¡¡   My soul is being controlled by the Lord of the Evil. Defeat him before saving me.

awardEntries.text: I will remember what you've done for me!

entries.text: Triumph Path Sprite's man is obviously not a soft guy!#1[23]Let him/her go...

addPrompts.text1: You gotta to pay the price to enter in hell!!
What a surprise! You find me so soon!
addPrompts.text2: lol! Ill wait for the fun!

awardEntries.text: Triumph Path Sprite's man is obviously not a soft guy!#1[23]Let him/her go...

entries.text: Don't feel that way, #1[33]you have more chances to go there!!!
I know you have finished the task, haven't you?

awardEntries.text: Don't feel that way, #1[33]you have more chances to go there!!!
I know you have finished the task, haven't you?

addPrompts.text1: Kill those Giant Willows for the safety of our people!!!
Miss those monsters in Willow Forest? It's a chance for you!
addPrompts.text2: You know the way to Willow Forest, don't you?#1[33]

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Go destroy those monsters!!!

awardEntries.text: Thank God it's all finished! #1[35]Thank you so much!!
You're making progress, #1[6]is Willow Forest good??

steps.description: Tell Flap-eared Pig that Geralyn has returned safely.

addPrompts.text1: I really want to see her!!!
Take me back to village. Those spiders are horrible!!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Leave me, you damn spiders!
¡¡¡¡Take me back to Goal Manor! I am Geralyn! The spiders here are horrible
¡¡¡¡Why is she hiding from me!? Ok, I'll find another way to see her. Can you help me?

awardEntries.text: Ah! how did he come in? You've known King's Intrigue?!...

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Those vicious monsters!!Go and destroy them!!!

entries.text: What's up? You're in a sweat!

awardEntries.text: What's up? You're in a sweat!

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡In this world full of monsters and beasters we need a true hero fighting for us! Those coward-like soldiers will not take people's lives and happiness on minds! Can you fulfill people's wish?
¡¡¡¡You are good and really impressive. But this is the first step in Darkness Hamlet. You will meet stronger rivals in Swan Pass. Good luck!

addPrompts.text1: We almost reach the victory! We should petition for our people!
You are big guy now for breaking through the Pass!
addPrompts.text2: We need a hero to get problems dones!

addPrompts.text1: There is a long and arduous way for you to go!!
After the Swan Pass, you can go to Darkness Hamlet!!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡In this world full of monsters and beasters we need a true hero fighting for us! Those coward-like soldiers will not take people's lives and happiness on minds! Can you fulfill people's wish?
¡¡¡¡You are good and really impressive. But this is the first step in Darkness Hamlet. You will meet stronger rivals in Swan Pass. Good luck!

awardEntries.text: That Bandits Lord is not bad. How can he find such a strong rival!?
Our king is waiting for you!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Our Bandits Lord is right in the Darkness Hamlet. That you defeated me doesn't mean that you can defeat our lord!

awardEntries.text: I don't think those evil-doers will hurt the people again!

Bring "Royal Sword" and "Elixir by Fiend of Plague" to General Lee

You bother me just for this trifling matter?#1[43]
Why did you come here again!#1[30]Disappointed!!

Welcome to my dog's birthday party!#1[6]

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡Want to learn something? Sorry. These days the bandits are getting rampant. I don't have the time for teaching. But there is a man called Freddie. He can teach you many skills. Why don't you go and find him!

addPrompts.text1: The bandits around Cloud City are rampant, be careful!!!
I never thought that I have a fan. Do you really want to be my apprentice?
Whick kind of mentor do you need? I have a lot at hand.

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Want to learn something? Sorry. These days the bandits are getting rampant. I don't have the time for teaching. But there is a man called Freddie. He can teach you many skills. Why don't you go and find him!
¡¡¡¡My skills are for battle. If you want to learn skills for living, go and find Housewife. She's an excellent craftswoman and at least you won't have to worry about food every day.

awardEntries.text: Does the drunkard ask you to look for me?

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I've taught you everything I could. There is a so-called M/A Manager in the city. You can learn something more from him!

awardEntries.text: What a surprise!! You are among the few guys coming here recently.
I'm here to serve for skill-learning guy!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡What? You didn't find the one you want here? But few guys come here to volunteer to be mentors these days. For this reason, I'll give you a special service! Let you be my disciple! It's time to get down to business. Let's start our first lesson! Defeat 10 Lizards in the wild.

awardEntries.text: You are so quick! What a surprise!
OK, well done! You are talented for learning Kongfu!

steps.description: Bring "Letter of M/A Manager" to "Pet Curer"
Travel to East Gate to speak with "Corey"

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡I've taught you all my skills. But someone else have new skills to teach you! Pet Curer who owns a pet shop in Cloud City is a belle!! Oh~No~She is a warm-hearted and wise girl~~Uh~She is a Pet trainer~You can consult her for lots of pet knowledge.

addPrompts.text1: Get to know your way around!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I've taught you all my skills. But someone else have new skills to teach you! Pet Curer who owns a pet shop in Cloud City is a belle!! Oh~No~She is a warm-hearted and wise girl~~Uh~She is a Pet trainer~You can consult her for lots of pet knowledge.

awardEntries.text: I can offer you Pet's treatment and improvements.

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡When your pet reaches level 30, I can help your pet evolve! Then it can be stronger! Oh, it's late, my brother has still not come back. Can you go and find him and then bring him home?

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡Evil Spider must conspire something. Geralyn must be in Cobweb Woods. I have to pretend to be Geralyn. Can you help me save Geralyn?

addPrompts.text1: Those spiders killed many of our villagers. I miss the days when Flap-eared Pig was here!!
I don't if Geralyn is still alive!
I'm counting on you to save Geralyn!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Evil Spider must conspire something. Geralyn must be in Cobweb Woods. I have to pretend to be Geralyn. Can you help me save Geralyn?
¡¡¡¡Thank you for saving me. Goal Manor is in danger now. I want to go back to inform our villagers. Please take me back!

awardEntries.text: Thank you for helping me to see Geralyn again!

talkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Geralyn? Is that really you?! I spent so long Heaven! If Geralyn is right, let's get rid of some Spider Overlords.

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡I didn't catch even one dragonfly when I play outside with little brothers! I'm longing for it...Can you get one for me??

entries.text: ¡¡¡¡Maria asked me to get her some fennel when I came here. Please take this fennel to her and tell her that I'm fine. I have some more herbs to pick, but I'll be back soon!

addPrompts.text1: Go back and tell them that you're ok!
I wonder if he won the contest...
